Welcome to Module 7. In this module, we're going to talk about the Six Figure Funnel Formula Amplification Autoresponder Chain. This is a strategic series of multiple email autoresponders that all work together to power individuals through the Six Figure Funnel and maximize transaction value. Now we're going to start by talking about all of the different follow-up sequences that make up the Six Figure Funnel Formula. We're going to talk about something called the Second Chance Offer and what it is. I'm going to show you the chain sequence flow, how these different follow-up sequences work together. We're going to set up the sequence using Aweber. I'm going to show you how to set up the chain automation and then I'm going to give you an overview of the different sequence messaging.
